question: 8강에 진출한 팀 목록
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM teams WHERE id IN (SELECT home_team_id FROM matches WHERE round='qf' UNION SELECT away_team_id FROM matches WHERE round='qf') ORDER BY name

question: 승부차기까지 간 경기가 몇 개야?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM matches WHERE pen_home IS NOT NULL

question: 결승전에 출전한 두 팀은?
gold_sql: SELECT h.name AS home, a.name AS away FROM matches m JOIN teams h ON m.home_team_id=h.id JOIN teams a ON m.away_team_id=a.id WHERE m.round='final'

question: 이번 대회 전체 골은 몇 개야?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM goals

question: 0-0 무득점으로 끝난 경기 수
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM matches WHERE ft_home=0 AND ft_away=0 AND et_home IS NULL

question: 연장까지 간 경기들
gold_sql: SELECT h.name AS home, a.name AS away FROM matches m JOIN teams h ON m.home_team_id=h.id JOIN teams a ON m.away_team_id=a.id WHERE m.et_home IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.id

question: 자책골이 나온 경기의 선수와 크레딧 받은 팀
gold_sql: SELECT p.name AS scorer, t.name AS credited_team FROM goals g JOIN players p ON g.scorer_player_id=p.id JOIN teams t ON g.team_id=t.id WHERE g.detail='owngoal'

question: 한 경기에서 3골 이상 넣은 선수
gold_sql: SELECT p.name FROM goals g JOIN players p ON g.scorer_player_id=p.id WHERE g.detail<>'owngoal' GROUP BY g.match_id, p.id HAVING COUNT(*)>=3

question: 페널티킥으로 득점한 선수 목록
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM goals g JOIN players p ON g.scorer_player_id=p.id WHERE g.detail='penalty' ORDER BY p.name

question: 전반에 앞섰지만 최종적으로 패한 경기
gold_sql: SELECT h.name AS home, a.name AS away FROM matches m JOIN teams h ON m.home_team_id=h.id JOIN teams a ON m.away_team_id=a.id WHERE (m.ht_home>m.ht_away AND m.ft_home<m.ft_away) OR (m.ht_away>m.ht_home AND m.ft_away<m.ft_home)

question: 득점왕 TOP 5
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) AS goals FROM goals g JOIN players p ON g.scorer_player_id=p.id WHERE g.detail<>'owngoal' GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY goals DESC, p.name LIMIT 5

question: 어시스트가 가장 많은 선수 TOP 5
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) AS assists FROM goals g JOIN players p ON g.assist_player_id=p.id GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY assists DESC, p.name LIMIT 5

question: 카드를 가장 많이 받은 팀 TOP 5
gold_sql: SELECT t.name, SUM(s.yellow_cards)+SUM(s.red_cards) AS cards FROM match_stats s JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY cards DESC, t.name LIMIT 5

question: 심판별 평균 파울 수 TOP 5
gold_sql: SELECT m.referee, ROUND(AVG(s.fouls),1) AS avg_fouls FROM matches m JOIN match_stats s ON s.match_id=m.id WHERE m.referee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.referee ORDER BY avg_fouls DESC, m.referee LIMIT 5

question: 슈팅을 가장 많이 한 팀 TOP 5
gold_sql: SELECT t.name, SUM(s.shots_total) AS shots FROM match_stats s JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY shots DESC, t.name LIMIT 5
